global.description: The ad features a blue gradient background with a prominent logo and clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Blue gradient background
elements.description: A smooth blue gradient background that fills the canvas.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'VaultRun' in bold, modern typography at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The text 'Secure & simple' is prominently displayed in a large, clear font.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: The phrase 'No hidden fees' appears below the headline in a smaller font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Start now' in a bold, inviting font.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unspecified element that may represent a decorative shape or icon.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another unspecified element that appears at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and clean, VaultRun, secure and simple service
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, supporting text, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VaultRun, Secure & simple, No hidden fees, Start now
